methods.description: This method analyzes the correlation between element contents and grain size indices of sediments from core WH-05 using SPSS19.0 software. It helps to understand the relationships between different elements and sediment characteristics.

steps.description: Use SPSS19.0 software to analyze the correlation between the element contents and grain size indices of sediments from core WH-05.
Interpret the correlation coefficients to understand the relationships between mean grain size (Mz) and element contents.
steps.searchable_summary: interpret correlation coefficients for Mz and element contents

methods.description: This method conducts an R-type factor analysis on the element contents in the sediments from core WH-05 using SPSS 19.0. It identifies the controlling factors affecting the element contents.

steps.description: Conduct an R-type factor analysis on the element contents in the sediments from core WH-05 using SPSS 19.0.
steps.searchable_summary: perform R-type factor analysis using SPSS 19.0

steps.description: Extract common factors (eigenvalues > 1) using the principal component method and covariance matrix.
steps.searchable_summary: extract common factors using principal component method

steps.description: Interpret the factor analysis results to determine the influence of terrigenous sediments, marine chemistry, and organisms on the element contents.
steps.searchable_summary: interpret factor analysis results for sediment influences
